Video.summary: It’s still opening week of bow season in Oklahoma and the crew has three tags left to fill.
Video.title: "Tagged Out At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: The crew is all at the Dirty Bird in Oklahoma kicking of the 2024 Rifle season.
Video.title: "Rifle Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: In this episode Andy goes back to his home farm in Alabama for deer and quail hunting. Not only does he make incredible dishes with his former ‘masterchef’ contestant Alex which he serves to local children in need but he explains how hunting is never about “just the hunt” but about the camaraderie, friendship and memories made through the pursuit of the harvest.
Video.title: Wildbound - "Alabama"

Video.summary: Join us for an unforgettable Women Go Hunting experience at Legends Ranch in Michigan!
Video.title: "Women Go Hunting"

Video.summary: U.S. Marines combat correspondent Ken Plant tells of being captured and tortured as a POW.
Video.title: "Ken Plant"

Video.summary: Phillip Culpepper heads to Maryland to turkey hunt with Camospace Sweepstakes winner Brian Niblett. After have a gobbler slip away off the roost the guys only have a few more hours to get it done before the noon hunting cutoff.
Video.title: "Helicopter Flys In On Gobbler"

Video.summary: Spring in Michigan means turkey season is on. In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew returns for Turkey Camp 2025, where changing weather, early mornings, and vocal birds set the tone for the week. After dialing in their setups at the range, the team heads into the field to chase gobblers across hardwoods and open farmland. From patient sits at sunrise to midday moves and carefully planned decoy strategies, each hunt brings new challenges and opportunities. Close encounters, tough conditions, and well-timed shots highlight the grind of spring turkey hunting, as the crew makes the most of every chance in the Michigan woods.
Video.title: "Camp Longbeard"

Video.summary: On this adventure, we travel to Sioux Narrows Ontario Canada for a week long trip with Time on the Water to Lake of the Woods. In this episode we share the stories of Vietnam Veteran Leon Merhkens, fire fighters Jeff Benson/Seth Beyer and founder/CEO of Time on the Water, Chris Hansen. In addition, the fishing is pretty good too! We also highlight Iowa City Scheels Hometown hero Nic Pruter.
Video.title: "Time on the Water"

Video.summary: In part 1 of the British episodes, Andy starts his road trip around the United Kingdom in the Cotswolds where he sets out to hunt and taste the beautiful venison that Michelin star chef, Mark Robinson has to offer. He then proceeds to travel to the border of Scotland where he samples some of the finest and most historic bird shooting practices found throughout the British Isles.
Video.title: Wildbound - "UK Part 1"

Video.summary: John Sewell has played a huge part in the development of feeding Fortified Cottonseed 365 days a year. Laramie Barrett of Fortified Cottonseed joins John for a great weekend of hunting at his ranch in Uvalde, Texas. This is a great time for Laramie to get away from the office and see the first hand of how their product is performing.
Video.title: "Fortified Cottonseed"

Video.summary: Tyler Jordan heads back to his college stomping grounds at Ole Miss to hunt with Athletic Director Keith Carter and William Jones. After a tough few days they were finally able to find some birds that were willing to work!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Ole Miss Double"

Video.summary: Michael Pitts of Realtree Road Trips joins Anthony Virga and Matt Garger hunting the hills of New York.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Pitts Hunts New York"

Video.summary: Justin and Brandi with Big Dreams Outdoors finish up their slam hunting Merriam turkeys with 7J Outfitters in Wyoming. It was a tough week for Justin but persistence pays off!
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Big Merriam Dreams"

Video.summary: Capt. Justin and Florida WaterSports pro Jeff Lange go deep off Panama City Beach to test the limits of a new battery powered reel. The results are surprising.
Video.title: "Electric Deep Drop"

Video.summary: When tarpon don’t cooperate, it’s time for Capt. Justin and friend Ethan Register to have a competition for dinner options in the gulf’s grocery store.
Video.title: "Once Upon a Wahoo"

Video.summary: Capt. Jared joins his best new bud, Capt. Garrett George for a summertime Mahi bash.
Video.title: "Islamorada Mahi"

Video.summary: The Southards are heads to Table Rock for the annual family vacation. Receding water poses a challenge but there’s no lack of fish or laughs at the lake!
Video.title: "Table Rock Tradition"

Video.summary: The boys are at the dirty bird in Oklahoma kicking off the second day of bow season. Randy is already tagged out on a dandy of an 8 point we showed you last season in the “Camp Buck episode”. Joe Umphries from Big Tine is in camp and he is trying to close the deal on a buck he had a close call with last season at the Dirty Bird.
Video.title: "Bow Camp At The Dirty Bird"

Video.summary: Trenton meets up with Tom Brewbaker as they fly down to Venice Louisiana to fish with Mike Frenette. Mike runs the Redfish Lodge of Louisiana and has over forty years of angling experience. Mike teaches the guys about the local waters including pogey boats and most importantly, world class red fish.
Video.title: "Crimson Waters"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man Season 3, Slade puts in some early summer farm work to Ensure his target bucks are well fed! Slade also Talks about his Target buck for the year, "Pope"! Slade is laying the trap early in hopes "Pope" makes a mistake early!
Video.title: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Image.alt: "Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"
"Summer Farm Work, Deer Season is Coming!!"

Video.summary: On this episode of Hunting Land Man, Slade does more summer food plot prep in hopes "Pope" will make an appearance! With Rain on the way Slade is able to disk and seed his "Pope" Summer spot!
Video.title: "The Plan for "POPE"!"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger meet up with Capt. Brain Wilson in Galveston, TX for a taste of what the Texas Gulf Coast has to offer.
Video.title: "Welcome to Galveston"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger join Capt. Brain Wilson in Galveston, TX for some hot Red Snapper action.
Video.title: "Red Snapper Slam"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger go north for a change to sight fish tripletails in Florida Bay.
Video.title: "Triple Tail in the Florida Bay"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger head to the hump on a windy day to target tunas and find some bonus mahis and tripletails as well.
Video.title: "Rough Day at the Hump"

Video.summary: Being consistently productive on the water means knowing how to adapt to conditions. Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger switch it up and fish shallow for sailfish.
Video.title: "Sailfish Save The Day"

Video.summary: Capt. Scott Walker and Capt. Steve Rodger launch from the incomparable Oceans Edge Resort in Key West, Florida to hunt down all kinds of sport fish.
Video.title: "Key West Mahi and Sails"

Video.summary: What starts as a normal trip turns wild as Capt. Jared and Capt. Garrett get swarmed by Cobia.
Video.title: "The Prodigal Son"

Video.summary: LBP Spotlights Internet Personality and YouTube Star Lawson Lindsey as he searches for trophy fish at the Headwaters of the Loxahatchee River.
Video.title: "Lawson Lindsey"

Video.summary: An Honor No One Wants: A Gold Star Family is the immediate family member(s) of a fallen soldier who died while serving in a time of conflict. Sheila Mitchell-Murphy honors the memory her Son…American hero Etienne Murphy.
Video.title: "Sheila Mitchell-Murphy"

Video.summary: Nick hops on board with Capt. Jimmy Gagliardini bailing reef fish of snapper, mahi, grouper, macks and more along the Marathon patch reefs.
Video.title: "Marathon Reef Running"

Video.summary: In this episode Captain Brandon Branch will be fishing with his long time friend John Kreusch over in Steinhatchee Florida. It's no secret that a large number of Redfish call Steinhatchee home especially during the spring season. You know it's a good day when you have to leave em chewing, so sit back and enjoy some North Florida fishing catching action!
Video.title: "Overslots In Steinhatchee"

Video.summary: Qualifier 5 is the second event day in Cornwall, Ontario taking place on Lake St. Francis, part of the famed St. Lawrence Seaway.
Video.title: BaitFuel Fishing Tour - "Qualifier 5 - Cornwall, Ontario"

Video.summary: In this episode of Winchester Life, the crew travels to Kodiak Island, Alaska, in pursuit of blacktail deer in some of the most remote terrain they’ve faced. After a multi-day journey by air - and sea, they arrive in a landscape defined by steep mountains, thick brush, and ever-changing weather. Once on the ground, the team confirms their setups and puts Winchester’s Supreme Long Range ammunition to the test as they glass expansive hillsides, pick apart coastal terrain, and carefully plan each move. From quick opportunities along the shoreline to calculated stalks in the high country, every moment demands focus and precision. Against the backdrop of Alaska’s wild beauty, this episode highlights the challenge, the strategy, and the performance it takes to capitalize when the opportunity finally comes together.
Video.title: "Alaska Supreme"

Video.summary: We find ourselves fishing with Troy from Lonestar Beer. Not only is Troy a great friend he is also a big supporter of Hunters Extravaganza. We get to catch up in the offseason and spend a day on the water discussing future events and reflect on what all Texas has to offer.
Video.title: "Lonestar Redfish"

Video.summary: Cable is a huge supporter of Texas Hunting and everything Teas Trophy Hunters. We are blessed to spend a few days with hum at the beautiful Saddle Creek Ranch in Brady Texas. Greg has a tight management plan and we are glad we got to enjoy his ranch with him and his team.
Video.title: "Cable Smith"

Video.summary: After taking a break from hunting for personal reasons, Phillip Culpepper gets back in the turkey woods. They spend some time in Wyoming, and then hunt in Montana, too.
Video.title: "In Memory of Shannon | Phillip Culpepper is Back | "

Image.alt: "In Memory of Shannon | Phillip Culpepper is Back | "
"In Memory of Shannon | Phillip Culpepper is Back | "
"In Memory of Shannon | Phillip Culpepper is Back | "

Video.summary: The guys meet up with Tyler Farr and Nate Hosie. Then, they call in a longbeard right off the roost. Later that day, Phillip Culpepper and Drake Lamb head to a brand new farm they just got permission to hunt, and right before fly-up, Drake Lamb cuts down a gobbler that comes a long way.
Video.title: "Tyler Farr Tags One Right Off the Roost | Gobbler Leaves Hens | "

Image.alt: "Tyler Farr Tags One Right Off the Roost | Gobbler Leaves Hens | "
"Tyler Farr Tags One Right Off the Roost | Gobbler Leaves Hens | "
"Tyler Farr Tags One Right Off the Roost | Gobbler Leaves Hens | "

Video.summary: Illinois isn’t the first state you think about when it comes to waterfowl, but the Wentz Brothers have dialed in some honey holes over the years. On this episode, a slew of waterfowl experts put to the test some of the newest Winchester waterfowl ammunition during the great migration of the Mississippi Flyway in early December. We’ll also head north to the shores of Kodiak Island, Alaska with Chris and Casey Keefer as they push the limits of Winchester’s new Last Call Double Shot on fast-ripping sea ducks. - GUESTS: Zach Wentz (Team Winchester) Nathan Robinson (Winchester Ammunition) Ryan Swaner (Winchester Repeating Arms) Chris Jennings (Ducks Unlimited) Mike Brasher (Ducks Unlimited) Scott Olmsted (American Hunter) Travis Hall (Field & Stream) Chris Keefer (Team Winchester) Casey Keefer (Team Winchester)
Video.title: "Flight Proven"

Video.summary: Col. Nick Nichols from Folds of Honor and Olympic skeet shooter Dania Vizzi are both proud Americans who have represented their country overseas. Col. Nichols commanded the air in the cockpit of a fighter jet for countless missions during his seven combat tours and Dania donned the stars and bars proudly on her shooting vest as an Olympian in Paris. Now with Winchesters in hand, both are in the Midwest whitetail woods during late November during the back end of the rut hoping to connect on a Missouri monarch.
Video.title: "The Colonel & The Olympian"

Video.summary: While getting ready for the 2023 turkey season, we couldn't help but look back at some of the best "off-the-roost" turkey hunts from our video vault. Check out these Team Realtree turkey hunts.
Video.title: "The Best Off-the-Roost Turkey Hunts"

Video.summary: JP heads to Lake Ontario after a long winter to catch cold water smallmouth bass on a suspending Jerkbait.
Video.title: "Jerkbait Smallmouth"

Video.summary: Blair and Capt. John Beach catch Grouper and Snapper off the coast of - Homosassa, FL
Video.title: "Sandstone Parking Lot"

Video.summary: Join seasoned anglers Danny Allen and Greg Devault as they embark on an exhilarating fishing expedition along the serene waters of the Econfina River and the breathtaking Gulf Coast. In this thrilling TV show, watch as Danny and Greg tackle the challenges of reeling in trophy fish while exploring the diverse ecosystems and hidden gems of these picturesque locales. With expert tips, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable moments, this fishing adventure promises excitement and inspiration for anglers of all levels. Tune in to witness the excitement unfold on the waters of the Econfina River and the Gulf Coast with Danny Allen and Greg Devault!
Video.title: "Econfina Expedition"

Video.summary: Part 2 of this friendly competition picks right back up where things left off in Steinhatchee, FL with Capt. Mike Anderson and Capt. Ryan Rickard.
Video.title: "Friendly Competition Part 2"

Video.summary: Kyle takes to the water in a way few anglers dare, fishing from a Sea-Doo in search of the ancient lake sturgeon, a species that’s been around since the age of the dinosaurs and can live over 100 years. Hooking into one of North America’s largest freshwater fish from a personal watercraft proves to be a challenge unlike any other.
Video.title: "Extreme Lake Sturgeon"

Video.summary: During this episode of Ship Shape TV Essentials the SSTV team meets with the crew at Bennett Trim Tabs to outfit a smaller Boston Whaler with a set of spring loaded trim tabs to help improve its ride. They then head over to meet the guys at TNT Custom Boat Works to get a new fuel tank built for the AquaSport Project.
Video.title: Essentials - "Trim Tabs and Fuel Tanks"

Video.summary: Mark Peterson's next adventure takes him west to Nevada for a giant bull elk with an early rifle elk tag in his pocket. As a non-resident, Mark had less than a 1% chance to draw this tag with Worldwide Trophy Adventures (WTA) TAGS Program. This is why he loves the tag system, you never know when you're going to get a tag. This area provides one of the best elk tags in the state of Nevada. Mark is bringing his brand new Gunwerks Nexus 300 PRC rifle to the high mountains of the Nevada desert.
Video.title: "Luck of the Draw - Nevada Elk Hunt"

Image.alt: "Luck of the Draw - Nevada Elk Hunt"
"Luck of the Draw - Nevada Elk Hunt"
"Luck of the Draw - Nevada Elk Hunt"

Video.summary: Mike had a little bit of a struggle to kickoff his 2024 Missouri Spring Turkey season. The birds seemed to be in a bit a of funky stage and wouldn't fully commit until later on in the season. After multiple failed attempts Mike finally finds a lonely gobbler in the right mood!
Video.title: "Tough Missouri Gobbler"

Video.summary: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they chase Whitetails at Morrow Ranch. This is a hunt that they had purchased earlier at the Disabled Outdoorsman in the year to be able to spend some time in the woods. A few days away to relax and spend quality time with loved ones should always be a priority. Morrow Ranch is definitely a go to place for low fence Texas hunting.
Video.title: "Morrow Ranch"

Video.summary: Capt. Jonathan Moss is in Crystal River, Fl, taking the Cayo out into the Gulf in search of Shallow Water Grouper.
Video.title: "Shallow Water Grouper"

Video.summary: Mark and Earl set out to check species number 21, the chukar, off their upland slam list. Typically chukars live at higher elevations making it an earned feat to harvest one. Can Mark and Earl battle steep rocky terrain at over 4000 feet in elevation? Stay tuned for more The Journey Within Episodes every Thursday. We are getting close with Mark only needing to harvest another 6 species!
Video.title: Upland Slam - "Oregon Mountain Chukar Hunting: - A Bird Hunters Diary"

Image.alt: Upland Slam - "Oregon Mountain Chukar Hunting: - A Bird Hunters Diary"
Upland Slam - "Oregon Mountain Chukar Hunting: - A Bird Hunters Diary"
Upland Slam - "Oregon Mountain Chukar Hunting: - A Bird Hunters Diary"

Video.summary: Randy and Cody are wrapping things up on the Raven before bow season arrives in Missouri. Planting I-70 the plot where Randy killed one of his biggest Missouri bucks ever last year. Then Randy and Cody attempt to setup a new farm they are calling “The River Farm” they attempt to plant a food plot, bush hog, spray the plot, setup a new Titan blind, and setup a Hooyman dual perimeter fence all in one day before the sun goes down.
Video.title: "I-70 and The River Farm"

Video.summary: Tyler and Colton Jordan go after the eastern bird in the quest for Colton's first ever Grand Slam. David Blanton also hunts opening day and has 6 gobblers come into the decoy.
Video.title: Spring Thunder - "Georgia Opener"

Video.summary: Follow TTHA President/CEO Christina Pittman and her husband Matt this week as they tag along side Dr. James Kroll for his annual deer day! This is a great opportunity to learn from one of the best. We are blessed to be able to share his knowledge with other like minded outdoor enthusiasts.
Video.title: "Deer Day"

Video.summary: In this episode, Slade goes over what he’s doing at his home property to create summer food plots for deer, and gives tips to those looking to do the same. - On the final hunt for the 2024 season, Lori gets a big Wilkinson County gobbler.
Video.title: "Summer Plots"

Video.summary: In this episode Slade takes Bentley on his very first duck hunt. Slade also gets to take a trip to duck hunting paradise with some great buddies of his. This episode is all about having a great time with great friends.
Video.title: "Duck Land Man"

Video.summary: Capt. Josh heads offshore with Marcus Castro for a day of fishing, hoping to reel in the perfect catch for tonight’s family dinner.
Video.title: "Captain's Choice"
